_comment: Species: Giant Savage Ape (巨猿) from Renegade Immortal. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Giant Savage Ape

canonical.appearance: Bipedal ape 10 m tall, fur iron-grey, fists the size of millstones, four arms on ancient specimens
canonical.size: 10 m adult, 200000 jin; ancient 30 m, millions of jin
canonical.behavior: Territorial mountain predator; uses fists to shatter formations; hoards spirit-fruit in caves
canonical.habitat: Suzaku mountain range, Great Saint Continent peaks, Wild Continent forests
canonical.cultivation: Core Formation -> Nascent Soul -> Spirit Severing (body-tempering)
canonical.diet: spirit fruit, mountain herbs, weaker beasts, lost cultivators
canonical.relationships: Rival of mountain lions; tamed by body-cultivation sects
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: giant_savage_ape — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
